summary: Both P1 findings concern signature_changes omissions in task-manifest.json, but inspection shows all cited symbols are already declared in the manifest: Task 1 signature_changes includes ProvenanceClass (line 23), EvidenceSelectionReasonCode (line 27), and EvidenceSelectionWarningCode (line 30); Task 2 signature_changes includes SelectedEvidenceSummary (line 97) and all its nested types (SelectedDeterministicFeature, SelectedContextualFamilies, SelectedResearchBrief, FamilyCoverageSummary, DeterministicCoverageSummary, ConflictSummary, SelectionWarning, SelectedSourceReference, BundleSelectionLineage, EvidenceSelectionDecision). The plan and manifest are already synchronized.
rebuttal: Finding [P1] for Task 1 claims ProvenanceClass, EvidenceSelectionReasonCode, and EvidenceSelectionWarningCode are absent from signature_changes, but task-manifest.json lines 23-31 already declare all three with correct declaration_file src/engine/evidence/selectionPolicy.ts. Finding [P1] for Task 2 claims SelectedEvidenceSummary nested types are omitted, but task-manifest.json lines 96-142 already declare SelectedEvidenceSummary and every nested type (SelectedDeterministicFeature, SelectedContextualFamilies, SelectedResearchBrief, FamilyCoverageSummary, DeterministicCoverageSummary, ConflictSummary, SelectionWarning, SelectedSourceReference, BundleSelectionLineage, EvidenceSelectionDecision) with declaration_file src/engine/evidence/selectEvidence.ts. Both findings are incorrect—the manifest already contains the required signature_changes entries.
